messages.content: wattpad: i’m got into the world naruto genderbend |  me (body lord beerus, system created a races & characters) part 1 i'm created a sonic the hedgehog (7 age) and Sash Lilac (6 age)

Part 1: A New Beginning

In a world where Naruto was genderbent, I found myself transported to a new realm with the body of the god of destruction, Lord Beerus. As I could feel the immense power coursing through my veins, I sensed that my purpose in this world was grand.

To make my journey more interesting, I had the power to create unique races and characters to accompany me. My first thought was to create Sonic the Hedgehog, but with a twist - I made him younger, only 7 years old. With his pretty blue fur and unimaginable speed, the newly created Sonic stood by my side, ready to explore and experience our new home.

Next, I created Sash Lilac, a sweet girl of just 6 years but with the mentality of a capable teenager. She was a brave and adventurous spirit, always eager to learn about the world around her. With her purple dragon scales glistening under the sun, she immediately captured the fascination and attention of everyone around.

Together, this unlikely trio embarked on a journey to navigate the land of genderbent Naruto. As we moved through different towns and small cities, we encountered various challenges and undertook missions to help the citizens of this world. Our primary goal was to maintain harmony and protect the people from any impending dangers.

Along the way, Sonic grew more confident in his abilities, learning how to harness his speed and energy for good. Sash Lilac, too, honed her skills and became a master dragon shapeshifter, her powers astounding everyone she met.

As for me, I experienced a sense of identity and purpose in this new world that I had never felt before. My powerful Beerus form brought respect and admiration from other inhabitants, but it also made it my responsibility to protect those who looked up to me.

Little did we know, though, that we were about to find ourselves in the path of an escalating threat - one that would require all our combined prowess, and might even put our existence to the ultimate test.

The only thing we knew for sure was that the adventures of me, Sonic the Hedgehog, and Sash Lilac had only just begun.

*To be continued in Part 2: The Rise of The Dark Forces.*

wattpad: i’m got into the world naruto genderbend | me (body lord beerus, system created a races & characters) part 2 team 7 (naruto uzumaki,Sonic the Hedgehog, and Sash Lilac) Sonic (13 age) Lilac (12 age)

Part 2: Team 7 Assemble!

As the years passed, Sonic the Hedgehog and Sash Lilac grew stronger and wiser. Sonic, now 13 years old, had mastered his speed and agility, darting through the wind with unmatched grace. Lilac, a year younger, had honed her shapeshifting abilities, her dragon powers captivating and formidable.

The time had come for us to form an official shinobi team - Team 7. Our formation was perfectly timed to coincide with the entrance of a fiery, determined, and genderbent Naruto Uzumaki. Naruto, Sonic, and Lilac made for an extraordinary blend of talents and abilities that complemented each other.

Although Naruto struggled initially with adjusting to her new teammates, her competitive spirit eventually led her to appreciate the strengths of Sonic and Lilac. This realization paved the way for the creation of a remarkable bond, and together, the three young shinobi began undertaking crucial missions that put their skills to the test.

Under the guidance of their sensei, the genderbent Kakashi Hatake, Team 7 faced numerous challenges that pushed them to their limits. As they excelled both as individuals and as a team, the village of Konohagakure and the rest of the world began to take notice of their accomplishments.

The trio's adventures led them to confront fearsome enemies, uncover hidden mysteries, and forge lasting friendships with allies from other villages. However, their harmony was about to be interrupted by the rise of a menacing force—the Akatsuki. This vile organization sought to collect all nine Tailed Beasts to gain unparalleled power, and one of these beasts resided within Naruto.

As Team 7 faced the looming threat of the Akatsuki, Kakashi emphasized the importance of teamwork and trust among them. Sonic, Lilac, and Naruto knew that they had to keep their bond unshakable, regardless of the dark forces that loomed over their world.

*Stay tuned for Part 3: The Battle Against the Akatsuki.*

wattpad: i’m got into the world naruto genderbend | me (body lord beerus, system created a races & characters) part 2.5  i’m created a Tails (6 age) , Knuckles (14 age), Carol Tea (11 age), Milla Basset (4 age) and Son Goku (3 age) . kurenai and asuma adopts Goku

Part 2.5: New Allies and a New Family

As Team 7 continued to grow in strength and solidarity, I felt the need to expand our incredible universe with more lively characters. Using my system, I created Tails, the 6-year-old two-tailed fox with a knack for mechanics; the 14-year-old Knuckles, an echidna warrior with powerful fists; Carol Tea, the 11-year-old wildcat with street smarts and a fierce fighting spirit; Milla Basset, the adorable 4-year-old hound with magical and empathetic abilities; and finally, Son Goku, a 3-year-old, cheerful, and energetic young Saiyan.

Now that these new, amazing characters had sprung to life, they needed proper guidance and support to cultivate their abilities. I sensed that Kurenai Yuhi and Asuma Sarutobi, two highly skilled Jonin and esteemed members of Konohagakure, would make perfect guardians.

Eager to provide a loving home for these unique children, Kurenai and Asuma decided to adopt Goku, who would eventually grow into one of the most powerful fighters in the universe. They welcomed Goku into their lives with open arms, raising him as their own and seeing to it that he had the necessary tools, training, and knowledge to harness his Saiyan powers for the greater good.

As for Tails, Knuckles, Carol, and Milla, they began working together in harmony, forming their specialized team to tackle various threats facing the world. They often found themselves joining forces with Team 7, Naruto, Sonic, and Lilac, as their unique abilities and individual expertise complemented each other in ways that made them a force to be reckoned with.

The alliances formed between these young heroes blossomed into wonderful friendships, and their collective power grew stronger than ever. They learned from each other and leaned on one another, as they faced challenging trials and tribulations both on and off the battlefield.

Nevertheless, as more incredible characters emerged and alliances were forged, the danger from the Akatsuki loomed ever larger. It was clear that the time was fast approaching when all the strength and unity of our heroes would be put to the test. The fate of the world was at stake, and everyone knew it.

*Get ready for Part 3: The Battle Against the Akatsuki.*
wattpad: i’m got into the world naruto genderbend | me (body lord beerus, system created a races & characters) part 3 The Battle Against the Akatsuki.

Part 3: The Battle Against the Akatsuki

As the shadows of the Akatsuki crept ever closer, our heroes stood firm, ready to face their greatest challenge yet. United and unwavering, Team 7, along with their allies Tails, Knuckles, Carol, Milla, and the young Son Goku, prepared for a battle that would decide the fate of their world.

The efforts of the Akatsuki to collect all nine Tailed Beasts intensified, with painful consequences for their members. Naruto, who held the Nine-Tails within her, knew that she would become a primary target in due course. With little time to spare, Naruto and her friends trained relentlessly, seeking to overcome their limitations and harness their full potential.

As Lord Beerus, I understood that this life-or-death struggle required me to be more than just a powerful destructive force; I had to become a reliable and unwavering source of guidance and support for these young warriors.

The day of reckoning came when the Akatsuki ambushed our heroes, their nefarious intentions palpable in the air. The battle that ensued was long and arduous, with each member of Team 7, Tails, Knuckles, Carol, Milla, and Son Goku showcasing their unique skills and powers to withstand and counter the relentless onslaught.

The most feared and dangerous members of the Akatsuki faced defeat at the hands of our resolute heroes. Sonic, with his unmatched speed, toppled adversaries before they could even comprehend what was happening. Sash Lilac, her dragon form fearsome and commanding, proved a righteous antagonist who struck powerful blows against the enemy. And Naruto, with her indomitable spirit, fought with everything she had to protect her friends, her village, and the world from destruction.

Together with Tails' inventive prowess, Knuckles' unyielding strength, Carol's ferocity, Milla's magical capabilities, and Son Goku's rising Saiyan powers, our heroes stood as a formidable presence, forcing the Akatsuki to retreat.

Even though the battle was won, our heroes knew that there was no room for complacency - the Akatsuki threat still loomed, awaiting another opportunity to seize the Tailed Beasts' power. But with unity, perseverance, and the bonds forged during their countless adventures, Team 7 and their allies stood ready to protect their world, come what may.

*Continue to Part 4: A New Era of Peace and Friendship.*
wattpad: i’m got into the world naruto genderbend | me (body lord beerus, system created a races & characters) Part 4: A New Era of Peace and Friendship. and i’m created a dr.eggman

Part 4: A New Era of Peace and Friendship

Having overcome the initial battle against the Akatsuki, Team 7 and their allies had proven their extraordinary skills and willpower. As time passed, their vigilance never faltered, but their world began to transform in unexpected ways. This new era was one of peace, where the youth of the village would inherit and protect the hard-won harmony their predecessors had achieved.

As Lord Beerus, I couldn't have been more proud of the brave warriors I had helped cultivate, but my desire for new challenges and characters remained. I decided to create Dr. Eggman, a brilliant and eccentric scientist with a twisted ambition to rule the world. But his ambitions met fierce and relentless opposition, particularly from Sonic and his friends.

Dr. Eggman's ingenious and dangerous contraptions kept our heroes engaged and on their toes. Together, Team 7 and their allies persisted in thwarting Dr. Eggman's plans, ensuring that he could never seize the world for himself. This continuous struggle, however, allowed the heroes to learn and grow stronger in ways they hadn't imagined before.

In the midst of this new era, bonds of friendship were not only solidified within Team 7 and their allies but expanded throughout the entire world. The various villages had been brought closer together because of the threat posed by the Akatsuki and Dr. Eggman. It was now a world where cooperation, rather than conflict, was the prevailing force.

These friendships, born from camaraderie and adversity, transcended generations and served as a permanent reminder of the peace protected by our heroes. For now, Lord Beerus, Team 7, Tails, Knuckles, Carol, Milla, and Son Goku stood together, basking in the harmony they had fought so hard for.

And even though the threat of the Akatsuki still lingered on the horizon, there was hope and faith in the valiant, unwavering heroes prepared to defend their world, no matter the challenges that lay ahead.

*Discover more adventures in Part 5: The Legacy Continues.*
wattpad: i’m got into the world naruto genderbend | me (body lord beerus, system created a races & characters) Part 4.5: Sonic x Lilac and Tails x Milla and Knuckles x Carol

Part 4.5: Bonds of the Heart

As the world reveled in peace and harmony, our heroes found themselves presented with an opportunity to explore something altogether different and profound: their emotions and personal relationships.

Over the many years of working together, Sonic and Lilac had discovered a growing, unshakable bond between them. This connection went beyond mere friendship, the two realizing that they shared a deep, mutual feeling that transcended their shared adventures. As they spent more time together, Sonic and Lilac found solace and support in one another. Eventually, they embraced these emotions and began a remarkable, tender journey into the realm of romantic love, complementing their powerful presence on the battlefield.

Similarly, Tails and Milla found themselves drawn to one another. Their affinity for gadgets and intellectual pursuits had initially brought them together, but their shared experiences and growth side-by-side gradually ignited the flame of a budding romance. The pair's intellectual prowess now extended to navigating the complexities of the heart, as they forged a sweet and enduring connection that morphed effortlessly from a profound friendship to love.

Knuckles and Carol, though they couldn't have been more different on the surface, discovered that their secret weapon was precisely this contrast of personalities. Their opposing traits balanced each other stirringly, with Knuckles providing a steady, calming presence to compliment Carol's wild, free-spirited nature. Over time, their loyal partnership transformed into a fiery, passionate romance that only grew stronger with each challenge the couple faced together.

As these love stories unfolded, Lord Beerus watched on with a mix of pride and satisfaction. A new dimension had been added to the lives of these incredible heroes, as love brought happiness and harmony not only to the world but also to their personal lives. What they had fought so hard to defend, they now experienced first-hand. Through this, they discovered the true power of compassion, love, and the connections formed between beating hearts.

*Look forward to future chronicles in Part 5: The Next Generation.*
wattpad: i’m got into the world naruto genderbend | me (body lord beerus, system created a races & characters) Part 5 The Next Generation naruto shippuden

Part 5: The Next Generation - Naruto Shippuden

With the world at peace and Team 7's bonds of love growing ever stronger, the time approached for a new chapter to unfold in the lives of our heroes. In the ensuing years, the world of Naruto Shippuden revealed a new generation of talented, young shinobi eager to protect the village and carry on the legacy of their forebears.

As Lord Beerus, I watched on proudly during the formative years of this new generation. Under the guidance of their exceptional predecessors, these young shinobi flourished, refining their skills and abilities with fierce determination. Among this new generation were the offspring of Sonic and Lilac, Tails and Milla, and Knuckles and Carol, unique and talented individuals destined for great achievements of their own.

Having heard tales of their parents' extraordinary adventures, the next generation was eager to embark on their own journeys and create a legacy unique to themselves. Forming their own teams, the young shinobi took daring missions under the watchful eye of their mentors, honing their skills and forming unbreakable bonds with one another.

However, challenges continued to emerge. The lingering threat of the Akatsuki, combined with the ambitions of Dr. Eggman and other nefarious forces, served as a continuous reminder of the dangers that their world faced. This grim reality inspired the next generation to remain vigilant, prepared for the inevitable battles to come.

As the young shinobi matured, they had the opportunity to learn directly from their parents and other accomplished heroes, who were eager to pass on the wisdom gained from their experiences. Naruto's unwavering dedication to protecting the village and her loved ones served as an inspiring beacon for the next generation.

Together, the new generation brought hope and promise to the world, demonstrating that the spirit and bond of their ancestors lived on within them. As they grappled with new challenges and grew stronger, the future looked bright for these young heroes - especially with the guidance and help of the formidable Lord Beerus.

*Continue the saga in Part 6: An Unforeseen Threat on the Horizon.*
wattpad: i’m got into the world naruto genderbend | me (body lord beerus, system created a races & characters) Part 1.5 i’m created a Chaos Emeralds, Master and Chaos Emeralds

Part 1.5: The Creation of the Chaos Emeralds and the Master Emerald

As Lord Beerus, I quickly realized that for these talented and unique characters to reach their full potential, they needed a source of incredible power to help them protect their world from any threats they might face on their journey. I decided to create the Chaos Emeralds—seven mystic gems with nearly limitless power enhanced by the energy of the universe itself.

Additionally, I created the Master Emerald—a larger, more powerful gem capable of controlling the energy of the Chaos Emeralds, ensuring that their might could be wielded with wisdom and restraint. It was of utmost importance that these magnificent creations fell into the hands of those who would wield them for the greater good.

With the establishment of Team 7, consisting of Naruto Uzumaki, Sonic the Hedgehog, and Sash Lilac, the responsibility of the Chaos Emeralds landed upon their shoulders. Sonic, in particular, resonated strongly with the power contained within these otherworldly gems.

Together, Sonic, Lilac, and Naruto discovered that by utilizing their strength and courage to gain control over the energy emitted by the Chaos Emeralds, they could unlock new levels of ability and power. This newfound might allowed them to channel their full potential when defending their world from the looming threat of the Akatsuki and other devious forces.

The Master Emerald, entrusted to Knuckles the Echidna, found its protector through his unbreakable commitment to safeguarding its power. Knuckles was unwavering, dedicating his life to ensure that the Master Emerald remained secure and free from the clutches of any evil forces that sought to misuse its power.

The existence of the Chaos Emeralds and the Master Emerald brought a new depth of meaning to the adventures of our heroes. These powerful tools not only enabled them to meet and overcome the challenges that lay ahead but also bound their fates together for eternity.

*Relive their daring exploits in Part 2: Team 7 Assemble!*
wattpad: i’m got into the world naruto genderbend | me (body lord beerus, system created a races & characters) Part 6 An Unforeseen Threat on the Horizon.

Part 6: An Unforeseen Threat on the Horizon

While the world basked in peace, and the new generation of shinobi continued to learn and grow, a new threat began to brew in the shadows. Unbeknownst to our heroes, an ancient, sinister force had awakened and sought to seize control over the Chaos Emeralds and the Master Emerald. With these powerful gems in its grasp, the ancient evil intended to conquer the world and enslave all its inhabitants.

As Lord Beerus, I felt the stirrings of this emerging darkness, but could not identify the precise nature of the danger. What I did know was that the prosperity and tranquility of the world were at risk once again. I sought to guide Team 7, their allies, and the next generation of shinobi to prepare for the forthcoming battle.

United by their love for their world and their dedication to upholding the peace, our heroes pooled their wisdom, experience, and power to uncover more about this mysterious threat. As they delved deeper, they discovered ancient artifacts and scrolls, shedding light upon the grave danger that was about to befall them.

Faced with the knowledge of the approaching adversary, Sonic, Naruto, Sash Lilac, Tails, Knuckles, Carol, Milla, Son Goku, and their children stood firm in their resolve, ready to confront this unforeseen enemy. Guided by the wisdom of their mentors, and my presence as Lord Beerus, the next generation of shinobi readied themselves for a battle that would be their ultimate test.

Unwavering in their determination, our heroes embarked on a perilous journey, leaving behind the safety of their village to combat the ancient evil that sought the Chaos Emeralds and the Master Emerald. With each step, their bonds of friendship and love grew stronger, serving as their guiding light in the face of darkness.

The time for the final confrontation was fast approaching, and the fate of their world hung in the balance. As chaos loomed over the horizon, the valor and unity of our heroes were all that stood between peace and destruction.

*Prepare for the climactic confrontation in Part 7: The Last Stand.*
